# Cenk Kurtoglu — Verified Digital Products

> Live apps, AI automation, editable source packages, and disclosed software-asset offers. No revenue, conversion, or client-acquisition outcome is guaranteed.

## Abonem: Subscription Tracker

- Type: iOS and iPadOS finance app
- Price: free download with optional Premium in-app purchases; regional pricing is shown by Apple
- Purpose: track subscriptions and recurring bills, review monthly/yearly totals, and receive renewal reminders
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/tr/app/abonem-subscription-tracker/id6776748341

## llms.txt Generator

- Type: paid Apify Actor / API automation
- Current public price: from $5 USD per 1,000 results
- Output: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, and a page dataset exportable as JSON/CSV
- Apify: https://apify.com/nacred_corner/llms-txt-generator
- Public source: https://github.com/cekuu35/llms-txt-generator

## SaaS Launch Swipe File

- Price: $19 USD one-time
- Type: downloadable launch-copy and distribution kit
- Includes: 40+ fill-in templates, a seven-day launch plan, Product Hunt materials, channel-specific copy, and a checklist
- Direct checkout: https://cengokurtoglu.gumroad.com/l/nsxvw?wanted=true&utm_source=llms_txt&utm_medium=geo&utm_campaign=all_products
